data.name: The Cheated Man's Revenge: Triple the Payback
data.detailed_description:
生存還是毀滅，這是一個值得考慮的問題。

但是選擇當一個龜男跳江還是當一個獵人復仇，這不是一個值得考慮的問題。

《龜男復仇記：以牙還牙，三倍奉還》是一款視覺小說遊戲。玩家將扮演主角劉杰昀，一個在職場與愛情中遭受背叛的普通社畜，在女友和職位均被黃毛奪走後，決定展開一場復仇計劃。

詳細介紹

在《龜男復仇記》中，你將置身於一個充滿陰謀與背叛的現代都市故事。主角本是一個勤懇踏實的職場打工人，原本有望晉升市場部經理，卻被剛入職、背景深厚的富二代趙威奪走機會。雪上加霜的是，從大學起相戀的女友唐竹也被趙威勾引，狠心拋棄了他。在人生低谷，主角決心奮起反抗，與盟友一起精心策劃一場驚心動魄的復仇。

主要人物

  • 劉杰昀(主角)：曼麗文化有限公司市場部普通職員，勤奮卻缺乏自信。

  • 趙威：原市場部新入職職員，現市場部經理。作風強勢，自大狂妄，搶走了本來屬於劉杰昀的職位與女友。

  • 李輕沫：畫家，趙威的未婚妻。

  • 趙萌萌：原市場部新入職職員，現市場部經理助手。

  • 趙曼麗：曼麗文化有限公司公司總經理。

  • 唐竹：主角的大學女友，與主角同期進入曼麗文化有限公司，財務部職員。

關鍵功能

  • 多分支劇情：每次選擇都會塑造你與可攻略角色的關係，並根據你與可攻略角色的羈絆解鎖不同的結局。如果所有可攻略角色的好感度都很高，說不定能觸發意料之外的結局。

  • 精美視覺風格：主要角色均具有動態立繪與CG場景。

data.short_description: 《龜男復仇記：以牙還牙，三倍奉還》是一款劇情驅動的視覺小說遊戲，融合職場鬥爭與情感復仇主題。從一名龜男蛻變為復仇者，策劃一場針對黃毛與拜金女的復仇。
data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 英文, 日文, 韓文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 顯示卡: Support for Vulkan 1.2

data.name: The Cheated Man's Revenge: Triple the Payback
data.detailed_description:
To be, or not to be, that is the question.


But choosing to be a cheated man jumping into the river or a hunter seeking revenge is not a question worth considering.

《The Cheated Man's Revenge: Triple the Payback》 is a visual novel game. Players will take on the role of the protagonist, Liu Jieyun, an ordinary office worker betrayed in both career and love. After losing his girlfriend and job position to a rival, he embarks on a thrilling revenge plan.

Detailed Introduction

In 《The Cheated Man's Revenge》, you will immerse yourself in a modern urban story filled with conspiracy and betrayal. The protagonist is a diligent and hardworking employee who was on the verge of being promoted to market department manager, only to have his opportunity snatched by Zhao Wei, a newly hired rich second-generation with a powerful background. To make matters worse, his girlfriend from university, Tang Zhu, is seduced by Zhao Wei and ruthlessly abandons him. At his lowest point, the protagonist resolves to fight back, teaming up with allies to meticulously plan a breathtaking revenge.

Main Characters

  • Liu Jieyun (Protagonist): An ordinary employee in the marketing department of Manli Culture Co., Ltd., diligent but lacking confidence.

  • Zhao Wei: Formerly a new employee in the marketing department, now the marketing department manager. Arrogant and domineering, he stole Liu Jieyun’s position and girlfriend.

  • Li Qingmo: A painter and Zhao Wei’s fiancée.

  • Zhao Mengmeng: Formerly a new employee in the marketing department, now the assistant to the marketing department manager.

  • Zhao Manli: General Manager of Manli Culture Co., Ltd.

  • Tang Zhu: Liu Jieyun’s university girlfriend, who joined Manli Culture Co., Ltd. at the same time as him, working in the finance department.

Key Features

  • Multiple Branching Storylines: Every choice shapes your relationships with romanceable characters and unlocks different endings based on your bonds with them. If all romanceable characters have high affection, you might trigger an unexpected outcome.

    Stunning Visual Style: Main characters feature dynamic sprites and CG scenes.

data.short_description: 《The Cheated Man's Revenge: Triple the Payback》 is a story-driven visual novel game that blends workplace struggles with themes of emotional revenge. Transform from a cheated man into a vengeful avenger, orchestrating a retribution plan against a rival and a materialistic ex.
data.supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or higher
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • Graphics: Support for Vulkan 1.2
